tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Key Performance Metrics June 2023

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Catherine Rinaldi

payload.title: President, Metro-North Railroad Interim President, Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: MTA Police Department
American Public Transportation Association
NJ Transit
LIRR Replacing Northport Station Platform

payload.description: Phase 1 of platform work at Northport Station is now complete and Phase 2 is underway. The full replacement of the existing 12-car platform is staged in two phases. New platform includes heated platform with Automatic Snow and Ice Melting System, updated ADA ramp, platform shelters, lighting, signage, new plaza area.
payload.location: Northport Station, East Northport, Suffolk County, Port Jefferson Branch

location_normalized.raw_text: Northport Station, East Northport, Suffolk County, Port Jefferson Branch

tool_args.label: Metro-North Makes Upgrades to North White Plains Station

payload.project_name: North White Plains Station Platform Upgrades
payload.project_type: station platform repairs and accessibility improvements
payload.status: Project completion slated for July 2023, currently in last phase of construction
payload.description: Repairs at North White Plains Station, an important transfer point for the Harlem Line. Includes replacement of deteriorating hollow core platform edges, new platform tactile strips, cementitious sealer coating, and concrete pier repairs.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement

payload.description: A state-of-good-repair effort to replace this critical bridge carrying Metro-North service into Grand Central Terminal. The project will ensure the safety of the public and railroad, improve rail reliability, build more resilient infrastructure, and reduce noise and vibration levels.

tool_args.label: Port Jefferson Branch Summer Track Work

payload.project_name: Port Jefferson Branch Track Work Project
payload.status: upcoming six-weekend project spanning July and August
payload.description: Major track work on the LIRR Port Jefferson Branch: install new running rail, third rail, switches and some 12,000 new concrete ties between Huntington and Port Jefferson. Bundling all work under same outages to minimize customer inconvenience.

tool_args.label: Hudson Line High-Level Platform Refurbishment

payload.status: ongoing, to be completed by September 2023
payload.description: Renewing edges of selected high-level 1980s-era platforms along the Hudson Line. Work progressed to New Hamburg in an 11-mile, single-track block between Beacon and Poughkeepsie. Also includes replacement of bridge timbers on the Wappingers Creek deck bridge.

tool_args.label: Mt. Vernon Bridge Replacement Projects

payload.status: Fulton Avenue and South Street Bridges slated to be fully replaced by May 2025
payload.description: Metro-North bridge replacement project in Mt. Vernon. Since 2011, replaced five bridges (Park Avenue, 14th Avenue, 6th Avenue, 10th Avenue, and 3rd Avenue Bridges). In 2022, the Fulton Avenue and South Street Bridges were closed over safety concerns and slated for full replacement by May 2025.

tool_args.label: LIRR one-day pandemic-era ridership record on May 31

payload.description: LIRR set a one-day pandemic-era ridership record on May 31 with 229,227 customers, surpassed again on June 13, 14, and subsequent days.

tool_args.label: LIRR ridership record on June 22, 2023

payload.description: Current LIRR one-day pandemic-era ridership record of 242,162 set on June 22, 2023 (as of report date).

tool_args.label: Metro-North one-day post-COVID ridership record on May 23

payload.description: Metro-North broke its one-day, post-COVID ridership mark on May 23, surpassed again on June 20.

tool_args.label: 155th Belmont Stakes

payload.description: 48,000 spectators watched the 155th running of the Belmont Stakes. LIRR carried approximately 22,900 fans to and from the event — about a quarter of total race attendance.

tool_args.label: APTA Gold Awards received by Metro-North

payload.description: Metro-North received APTA Gold Awards in Rail Safety (for the first-ever 60-mph laser train) and Emergency Management (for the dual-level High-Water Alarm System).

tool_args.label: International Level Crossing Awareness Day 2023

payload.description: LIRR participated in International Level Crossing Awareness Day (ILCAD) with MTA Police, NYSDOT, and FRA at Bethpage, Syosset, Farmingdale, Deer Park, and Oceanside grade crossings.

tool_args.label: LIRR Grand Central Madison vs Penn Station share

payload.claim_text: Customers have taken advantage of the new service, steadily shifting toward 35% share for trips to GCM and 65% share to Penn Station.
payload.subject: LIRR ridership distribution
payload.description: Since full service to Grand Central Madison was introduced on February 27, 2022, riders are shifting to 35% share for trips to Grand Central Madison and 65% share to Penn Station.

tool_args.label: Metro-North May 2023 ridership at 70.5% of May 2019

payload.claim_text: Metro-North ridership in May was 28% higher than May 2022 and represented approximately 70.5% of May 2019 ridership.
payload.subject: Metro-North ridership recovery
payload.description: Metro-North May 2023 ridership was 70.5% of May 2019 pre-pandemic levels.
